# CVPixelBufferPool

**Class**

A reference to a pixel buffer pool object.

## Declaration

```swift
class CVPixelBufferPool
```

## Overview

CVPixelBufferPool is a utility object for managing a recyclable set of [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVPixelBuffer] objects.

## Data types

- **CVPixelBufferPoolFlushFlags**: The flags to pass to flush the pool.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable

items.description: The flags to pass to flush the pool.
